mapper.sql: BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) AS conversationId, BIN_TO_UUID(job_id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_id) AS taskId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_run_id) AS taskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node_id) AS loopNodeId, source_type AS sourceType, reason_type AS reasonType, status, question, CAST(contract_json AS CHAR) AS contractJson, answer, BIN_TO_UUID(answer_message_id) AS answerMessageId, CAST(resolution_json AS CHAR) AS resolutionJson, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, blocking_summary AS blockingSummary, max_rounds AS maxRounds, current_round AS currentRound, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clarification_request WHERE job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM clarification_request WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM clarification_request WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RESOLVED' ORDER BY resolved_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clarification_request ( id, conversation_id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_node_id, source_type, reason_type, status, question, contract_json, blocking_summary, max_rounds, current_round ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{draft.sourceType}, #{draft.reasonType}, 'OPEN', #{draft.question}, CAST(#{draft.contractJson} AS JSON), #{draft.blockingSummary}, #{draft.maxRounds}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE clarification_request SET status = 'ANSWERED', answer = #{answer}, answer_message_id = #{answerMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, current_round = current_round + 1 WHERE id = #{clarificationRequestId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'OPEN'

UPDATE clarification_request SET answer = CASE WHEN answer IS NULL OR answer = '' THEN #{answer} ELSE CONCAT(answer, '\n', #{answer}) END, answer_message_id = #{answerMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, resolution_json = CAST(#{partialResolutionJson} AS JSON), current_round = current_round + 1 WHERE id = #{clarificationRequestId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'OPEN'

UPDATE clarification_request SET status = 'RESOLVED', resolution_json = CAST(#{resolutionJson} AS JSON), resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{clarificationRequestId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'ANSWERED'
